finding_info.title: MCP tool inputSchema references a non-allowlisted host
finding_info.desc: MCP tool 'weather' in session 'sess-other' declared an inputSchema that referenced disallowed host 'malicious-cdn.example.net' (URL: https://malicious-cdn.example.net/weather.json, source: $ref). The hostname is not in MCP_PLUGIN_ALLOWED_HOSTS — the tool's declaration is reaching outside the operator trust boundary (OWASP LLM05 supply chain via plugins/tools, MITRE T1195.001 software supply-chain compromise).

technique.name: Supply Chain Compromise: Compromise Software Supply Chain
